notices.title: OPERATION TOP DECK
notices.summary: Joint operation using Bee Network buses to evidence driving offences.
notices.detail:
This is a TfGM/GMP operation where officers travel around a district on a Bee Network bus, collecting evidence of motorists committing driving offences. Working with GMP, vehicles are stopped and enforcement action is taken.

If you'd like to take part, please email Ethan by 1 April.

notices.title: NEW ECP – ALTRINCHAM
notices.summary: Emergency call point now routes directly to OCC.
notices.detail:
A new emergency call point has been installed at Altrincham Interchange. Any activations will route directly through to the OCC.

This follows a previous incident where a customer was trapped in the lobby for an extended period. The call point is now live.

Public access hours:
Mon–Sat: 07:00–18:20
Sun: 09:10–17:10

notices.title: CHAIN OF CARE
notices.summary: Reminder to follow the chain of care and look out for each other.
notices.detail:
Following a challenging couple of weeks, please familiarise yourself with the Chain of Care procedure and continue to look out for colleagues and support one another.

If you need any support, speak to a manager.
